'''nakoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pymt|pymt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pymt|pymt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nakoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nækeheth|nækeheth]] || [[word:nækehej|nækehej]] || [[word:nækehesh|nækehesh]] || [[word:nækehe|nækehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nakokohoth|nakokohoth]] || [[word:nakokohoj|nakokohoj]] || [[word:nakokohosh|nakokohosh]] || [[word:nakokoho|nakokoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nakohoth|nakohoth]] || [[word:nakohoj|nakohoj]] || [[word:nakohosh|nakohosh]] || [[word:nakoho|nakoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nakofhoth|nakofhoth]] || [[word:nakofhoj|nakofhoj]] || [[word:nakofhosh|nakofhosh]] || [[word:nakofhof|nakofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nakohotho|nakohotho]] || [[word:nakohojo|nakohojo]] || [[word:nakohosho|nakohosho]] || [[word:nakohoko|nakohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nakohoth|nakohoth]] || [[word:nakohoj|nakohoj]] || [[word:nakohosh|nakohosh]] || [[word:nakoho|nakoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nakohothol|nakohothol]] || [[word:nakohojol|nakohojol]] || [[word:nakohoshol|nakohoshol]] || [[word:nakohokol|nakohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nakohothotho|nakohothotho]] || [[word:nakohojojo|nakohojojo]] || [[word:nakohoshosho|nakohoshosho]] || [[word:nakohoko|nakohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nakohothon|nakohothon]] || [[word:nakohojon|nakohojon]] || [[word:nakohoshon|nakohoshon]] || [[word:nakohokon|nakohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nakohothoro|nakohothoro]] || [[word:nakohojoro|nakohojoro]] || [[word:nakohoshoro|nakohoshoro]] || [[word:nakohokoro|nakohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
